pcs_state.source: Preserved existing prototype state; aggregation engine does not compute PCS state.

prototype_notice: PCS state remains prototype. Aggregation summarizes connector availability and does not compute a new scientific PCS value.
notes: Aggregation reads connector output availability only.
Empty connector outputs are Waiting, not Connected.
No missing values are estimated or fabricated.
